fixItPosts.body: In the reports is there a way to run analytics on NCRs for common issues or trends for a common issue, either equipment or processes. Example, run a report that looks at valve failures and can summarize into different failure groupings? Could it be subgrouped by operator?

messages.text: This is just a test @Jake Feil

activeFixIt.body: In the reports is there a way to run analytics on NCRs for common issues or trends for a common issue, either equipment or processes. Example, run a report that looks at valve failures and can summarize into different failure groupings? Could it be subgrouped by operator?

Within the main dashboard, there is some navigation language and workflow logic that is causing confusion.

The objective task categories currently displayed on the main dashboard are:

Open
Overdue
Due Today
Due Within 7 Days
Due Within 14 Days
Due Within 28 Days
Completed

These are good and should be considered the core visuals for team productivity.

However, when a user clicks into Open, for example, the next screen only shows the following status options:

All
On Track
At Risk
Blocked
Not Started
Completed

These should be treated as sub-filters under the main dashboard categories, not separate navigation areas.

For example, on the main dashboard, Open should show a breakdown of how many open objectives are:

On Track
At Risk
Blocked
Not Started

Then, when a user clicks Open, it should only take them to the open objectives. From there, the user should be able to apply additional filters without needing to navigate back to the home screen to view another category such as Due Within 7 Days.

Would it work better to have one Objective List view with filter selections instead of forcing users to navigate through multiple areas of the platform?

The suggested filter structure would be:

First filter: Ownership / Scope
My Objectives
Individual Person
Group / Department
All Objectives

Second filter: Main Category
All
Open
Overdue
Due Today
Due Within 7 Days
Due Within 14 Days
Due Within 28 Days
Completed

Third filter: Status
All
On Track
At Risk
Blocked
Not Started
Completed

The goal is to make the objective view more inclusive and flexible so users can quickly see what they need without moving through multiple screens. For example, a user should be able to select:

My Objectives + Open + At Risk
Operations Group + Due Within 7 Days + Blocked
All Objectives + Overdue + Not Started

This would create one centralized view where the user can filter by ownership, due-date category, and status. It should reduce confusion, improve visibility, and make it easier for teams and managers to identify what needs attention.

openJakeMerciObjectives.title: Finalize April expense report — personal CC items + remaining receipts
openJakeMerciObjectives.description:
Hi Jake! wrapping up the April expense report. I already have the corporate AmEx statement and the receipts you've sent me printed and organized:

Sal y Pimienta Houston (04/22) — $1,943.50
Hyatt Regency Houston (04/23) — $13.57
Hyatt Regency Houston (04/23) — $12.54
Conophil Sbuck Cafe Houston (04/24) — $5.37

To close it out whenever you have a moment, I'd need:

Your personal CC statement marked with the items you'd like reflected as business expenses (same approach as last time)
A heads-up on any remaining receipts you'd like included so I can print them and add them to the packet

No rush, just keeping it on the radar so we can wrap cleanly.
(Also doubling as an OMP test, flag anything that doesn't render right.)

openJakeMerciObjectives.title: Provide Tim Dibben with login credentials
openJakeMerciObjectives.description: Provide Tim Dibben with login credentials for working with and providing feedback on NCR Dashboard. tdibben@sandpro. @Mercileidy Jimenez

openJakeMerciObjectives.title: Engineering inputs needed for Retrievable Bridge Plug animation (Focus Digital)
openJakeMerciObjectives.description:
Hi Jake! Following up on the Focus Digital meeting with Brett. To kick off Week 1 of production, we need three inputs from our side:

STEP/CAD file of the wellhead type to be used
Standard procedure sequence that sets the retrievable bridge plug
Confirmation of the scenarios to be animated (normal deployment, worn/unretrievable replacement, alternative routine)

Could you point me to the right engineering contact(s) so I can coordinate the delivery of the assets? Quote is $4,800 total, with a 4–6 week timeline once we hand the files over to Focus Digital.
(Also doubling as an OMP test.. flag anything that doesn't render right.)
